description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker with a predominantly coral pink upper and a white rubber sole. The shoe features a classic Puma design, including a white formstrip running along the side and a green-and-white Puma label on the tongue. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with matching coral pink laces. The heel displays a black Puma logo on a white patch, and the interior is lined with a light gray or white material for comfort. The overall construction appears to be a mix of synthetic leather or suede for the upper, rubber for the sole, and textile for the lining. The shoe is clean, well-structured, and shows no visible signs of wear.
description: A coral pink Puma sneaker with a white sole, white side stripe, and standard criss-cross laces. Features a green Puma tongue label and a black Puma logo on the heel.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, coral pink laces, and the green Puma label on the tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the white Puma formstrip and the clean, uninterrupted coral pink upper.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the black Puma logo on a white heel patch and the white midsole.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the white formstrip and the overall sleek profile.
attribute_logo: Black puma silhouette on white heel patch; green-and-white Puma label on tongue
